text_original: In a little state with a small population, I would so order it, that, though there were individuals with the abilities of ten or a hundred men, there should be no employment of them;
text_normalized: In a little state with a small population, I would so order it, that, though there were individuals with the abilities of ten or a hundred men, there should be no employment of them;

text_original: I would make the people, while looking on death as a grievous thing, yet not remove elsewhere (to avoid it).
text_normalized: I would make the people, while looking on death as a grievous thing, yet not remove elsewhere (to avoid it).

text_original: Though they had boats and carriages, they should have no occasion to ride in them;
text_normalized: Though they had boats and carriages, they should have no occasion to ride in them;

text_original: though they had buff coats and sharp weapons, they should have no occasion to don or use them.
text_normalized: though they had buff coats and sharp weapons, they should have no occasion to don or use them.

text_original: I would make the people return to the use of knotted cords (instead of the written characters).
text_normalized: I would make the people return to the use of knotted cords (instead of the written characters).

text_original: They should think their (coarse) food sweet;
text_normalized: They should think their (coarse) food sweet;

text_original: and their common (simple) ways sources of enjoyment.
text_normalized: and their common (simple) ways sources of enjoyment.

text_original: There should be a neighbouring state within sight, and the voices of the fowls and dogs should be heard all the way from it to us, but I would make the people to old age, even to death, not have any intercourse with it.
text_normalized: There should be a neighbouring state within sight, and the voices of the fowls and dogs should be heard all the way from it to us, but I would make the people to old age, even to death, not have any intercourse with it.
